title: Solar Storm
description: Charged particles battered the arrays. Power -9.

title: Trader Arrives
description: A rover convoy exchanged parts for telemetry. Credits +30.

title: Hydroponics Fungus
description: A fungal bloom damaged lettuce trays. Food -8, morale -4.

title: Coffee Outage
description: The colony discovered the last filter was used yesterday. Morale -9.

title: Parts Cache
description: A buried crate contained useful components. Power +8, credits +20.

title: Sick Colonist
description: A fever spread through the bunks. Population -1, morale -6.

title: Dust Seal Failure
description: Fine regolith infiltrated the greenhouse seals. Food -6, morale -3.
